mano_cua.result_summary: 同项目lokus-15已验证：应用需要Supabase后端服务（VITE_SUPABASE_URL和VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY），缺少环境变量导致React应用完全无法初始化，编辑器UI不可用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Same project as lokus-15. Application requires Supabase backend credentials to initialize. Without them, React app crashes with supabaseUrl is required error.
